text: The Federal Reserve announced a 0.25 percentage point increase in the federal funds rate on Wednesday, bringing the target range to 5.25-5.50%. Chair Jerome Powell indicated that the central bank remains committed to bringing inflation back to its 2% target, while acknowledging that the labor market has shown resilience.

Researchers at MIT have developed a new machine learning algorithm that can predict protein structures with unprecedented accuracy. The method, published in Nature, combines graph neural networks with physics-based constraints to achieve results that rival experimental methods.

Global semiconductor sales reached $526 billion in 2023, a 9.4% decline from the previous year according to the Semiconductor Industry Association. However, industry analysts project a strong recovery in 2024, driven by demand for AI chips and automotive semiconductors.
